title: santalum obtusifolium
intro: Santalum obtusifolium, also known as the fingered sandalwood, is a species of sandalwood tree native to the Pacific Islands and Australia. The plant is prized for its aromatic wood and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Santalum obtusifolium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, essential oils, and capsules for consumption, with some traditional cultures using its wood for medicinal purposes, including treating wounds and infections.
